## How to Read This File

Each gap exposes queries across **four discovery layers** (with sub-layers).

- **L1 — Press & funding** (1a generic, 1b targeted press, 1c innovation hubs, 1d third-party agent anchor, 1e novelty negation) — institutional register.
- **L2 — Product launches** — founder register on Product Hunt / Show HN / Beta List / Indie Hackers.
- **L3 — Technical artefacts** — GitHub MCP first (sort=updated, no stars filter), fallback to topic pages and HuggingFace.
- **L4 — Community & ecosystem** — accelerators (4a), seed VCs (4b), university spin-outs (4c), competitions (4d), startup databases (4e).

**Quality gates applied at generation time:** layer completeness, vocabulary diversity (L1 vs L2 register), crypto exclusion (where the gap requires it), third-party qualifier (where required), stage anchoring on L1, geo weighting for europe-first gaps, novelty antipattern negation per gap.
